requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and Tropical Humidity Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线与热带湿度降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線與熱帶濕度降額

summary.en: Equatorial Guinea has no strongly confirmed national EV charger standardization body or dedicated public EVSE safety certification scheme. For project acceptance, IEC 61851-1 is the practical international baseline for conductive EV supply equipment, and IEC 61851-23 applies to DC charging stations. Because Equatorial Guinea has an equatorial tropical climate, charger documentation should address high humidity, condensation, corrosion, insulation resistance, enclosure ingress protection, surge protection, cable ageing, and thermal derating for outdoor coastal and island sites, including Malabo and mainland installations.
summary.zh: 未确认赤道几内亚存在强势的国家电动汽车充电桩标准机构或专门公开EVSE安全认证制度。项目验收中，IEC 61851-1是传导式电动汽车供电设备的实务国际基线，IEC 61851-23适用于直流充电站。由于赤道几内亚为赤道热带气候，充电桩文件应覆盖高湿、凝露、腐蚀、绝缘电阻、外壳防护等级、浪涌保护、电缆老化，以及马拉博、沿海和大陆站点户外运行的热降额。
summary.zht: 未確認赤道幾內亞存在強勢的國家電動汽車充電樁標準機構或專門公開EVSE安全認證制度。項目驗收中，IEC 61851-1是傳導式電動汽車供電設備的實務國際基線，IEC 61851-23適用於直流充電站。由於赤道幾內亞為赤道熱帶氣候，充電樁文件應覆蓋高濕、凝露、腐蝕、絕緣電阻、外殼防護等級、浪湧保護、電纜老化，以及馬拉博、沿海和大陸站點戶外運行的熱降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — IP Code for enclosure ingress protection
IEC 62752 / IEC 61439 context where applicable to charging and low-voltage assemblies
Project owner and utility safety acceptance requirements

summary.en: China's comparable charger baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930 DC communication. These documents are useful design inputs but incorporate China-specific connector, signalling, and operating assumptions. China domestic safety evidence also may not cover the tropical humidity, salt-laden coastal environment, condensation cycling, and corrosion exposure expected for Equatorial Guinea installations.
summary.zh: 中国可比充电桩基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930直流通信支持。这些文件可作为设计输入，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和运行假设。中国国内安全证据也可能未覆盖赤道几内亚安装中预期的热带高湿、含盐沿海环境、凝露循环和腐蚀暴露。
summary.zht: 中國可比充電樁基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930直流通訊支持。這些文件可作為設計輸入，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和運行假設。中國國內安全證據也可能未覆蓋赤道幾內亞安裝中預期的熱帶高濕、含鹽沿海環境、凝露循環和腐蝕暴露。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP and corrosion-resistance evidence, surge-protection ratings, residual-current protection details, emergency-stop and interlock documentation, and humidity/condensation derating analysis. A GB/T 18487 report alone is not enough to demonstrate IEC safety acceptance or suitability for Equatorial Guinea's equatorial climate.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全报告、直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、IP和耐腐蚀证据、浪涌保护额定值、剩余电流保护细节、急停和互锁文件，以及湿度/凝露降额分析。单独的GB/T 18487报告不足以证明IEC安全验收或适合赤道几内亚赤道气候。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全報告、直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、IP和耐腐蝕證據、浪湧保護額定值、剩餘電流保護細節、急停和互鎖文件，以及濕度/凝露降額分析。單獨的GB/T 18487報告不足以證明IEC安全驗收或適合赤道幾內亞赤道氣候。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where required by importer, site owner, SEGESA reviewer, lender, insurer, or EPC specification; no strong national EVSE safety scheme confirmed, so IEC evidence should be treated as the practical baseline
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence and does not prove tropical humidity suitability

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 61851 evidence as the safety baseline and add tropical humidity, condensation, corrosion, and surge-protection validation. China GB/T 18487 evidence is supporting design material, not a substitute for IEC-oriented project acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应以IEC 61851证据作为安全基线，并增加热带湿度、凝露、腐蚀和浪涌保护验证。中国GB/T 18487证据只是支持性设计材料，不能替代IEC方向的项目验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應以IEC 61851證據作為安全基線，並增加熱帶濕度、凝露、腐蝕和浪湧保護驗證。中國GB/T 18487證據只是支持性設計材料，不能替代IEC方向的項目驗收。
